---
title: "Zachary Mudge"
---

## Zachary Mudge

**Dates:** (1813/4-1867)

### Description

cousin of the Puslinch Yonges

### Biography

Zachary Mudge was first cousin of the Rev. John Yonge, their mothers being sisters named Anne (Grainger) Yonge and Jane (Grainger) Mudge.  His father was Admiral Zachary Mudge (1770–1852).  CMY describes visiting the elderly admiral and his wife in Coleridge, <i>Life</i>, 91.

### Letters

- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]
- Letter from 26 Septr 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
